title: Pocket Powers
description: Adds powerful elemental gems that grant passive buffs and flashy abilities
body:
# Pocket Powers

This mod adds a bunch of elemental gems (5 to be exact).
Each gem has a passive effect and an ability. To use a gem it needs to be either in the main hand or the offhand. Therefore you can have max two gems active at once.

To activate the ability Right-Click when in main hand, or Shift-Right-Click when in offhand.

### Fire Gem
Passive: Fire resistance

Ability: Summons a ring of fire with a 3-block radius, lighting nearby entities on fire and dealing knockback.
Cooldown: 15s

#### Recipe:
![Amethyst shard in center, Four fire charges in the corner, blaze rod top middle, magma cream bottom middle, rest, two gold blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95f2dbeba4dfa46b8f547fd220f1183e6425ca72.png)

### Health Gem
Passive: Four extra hearts. Dealing damage has a 20% chance of healing 30% of the damage dealt.

Ability: Restores 5 hearts to the wielder and summons a ring of healing, restoring 3 hearts to nearby entites.
Cooldown: 25s

#### Recipe:
![Amethyst shard in center, Four ghast tears in the corner, totem top middle, enchanted golden apple bottom middle, rest, two redstone blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf716573800f4f4771b9c28f5ccf8c77fb3a717d.png)

### Magic Gem
Passive: Immune to lightning and magic. Dealing 10hp or more damage has a 10% chance of summoning lightning on the target.

Ability: Summons a powerful, armor-piercing sonic boom. Armor has no effect on the damage.
Cooldown: 25s

#### Recipe:
![Amethyst shard in center, Four cornflowers in the corner, nether star top middle, lightning rod bottom middle, rest, two diamond blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a965c4bed3fdb3c358fa6afc4a37d5008ce9ff83.png)

### Mining Gem
Passive: Haste II

Ability: Unleashes a 2X2 beam tearing through blocks in your sight. 
Cooldown: 20s

#### Recipe:
![Amethyst shard in center, Four moss blocks in the corner, beacon top middle, diamond pickaxe bottom middle, rest, two emerald blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6686c4ed5b4ed0e17ca4f7486df5208c59f30a0e.png)

### Gravity Gem
Passive: Immune to fall damage. Transfers 80% of fall damage to nearby entities.

Ability: Launches you up vertically.
Cooldown: 25s

#### Recipe:
![Amethyst shard in center, two feathers in top corners, two windcharges in bottom corners, heavy core top middle, breeze rod bottom middle, rest, two iron blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a34277360b2a242e5230ce91e78ecf3c50c2982.png)
